1.title: ClusterStatus.green Minimum (by ClientId)
1.query:
timeseries cluster_statusgreen_minimum_by_client_id = avg(cloud.aws.es.cluster_statusgreen_minimum_by_client_id),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(cluster_statusgreen_minimum_by_client_id) desc
| limit 20
